claim_under_review: A model score on phenotypic screen prediction supports mechanism-discovery memory promotion.

dataset_provenance.population_or_species: human and/or cell-line contexts as declared by each screen
dataset_provenance.collection_context: assay-level experimental screen aggregation rather than direct clinical intervention

task_metric_binding.task: gene rank prediction for phenotypic screen outcomes
task_metric_binding.blocked_metric_inference: A strong rank metric does not by itself prove causal mechanism, cure relevance, clinical transfer, or cross-species validity.

out_of_scope: veterinary species transfer without bridge evidence
required_bridge_evidence: privacy and consent review if linked to longitudinal health memory

known_gaps: screen aggregation may hide lab effects
rank metrics may not capture biological fidelity
cell context may not match organism or patient context
negative or failed experiments may be underrepresented
benchmark_gap_model.why_gap_matters: Discovery memory can overgeneralize from benchmark success if benchmark provenance and biological transfer limits are not preserved.

missingness: complete screen-level provenance may be incomplete
failed or unpublished screens may be absent
cell-state and batch-effect metadata may be uneven
revision_reason: Add benchmark provenance gate to prevent benchmark-score collapse into unsupported biological or clinical claims.
falsification_route: Compare curator reconstruction accuracy with and without this packet; revise if provenance and transfer errors do not decrease.
next_executable_action: Run the validator and require this packet before benchmark-derived memory promotion.
